summary: Comprehensive testing of ORBITAL Trading Dashboard completed. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success on specific requirements), but frontend login mechanism has UI blocking issue with slide verification.

ui_bugs.issue: Slide verification mechanism prevents successful login - 'Access Platform' button remains disabled
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks all frontend testing and user access to dashboard

ui_bugs.issue: Form submission blocked by captcha-like slide verification

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access dashboard to test trading functionality due to login barrier

passed_tests: All 3 asset categories (Forex, Crypto, Metals) available via API
All price categories working with live data
Trade countdown and status data available
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend slide verification mechanism in login form. The login form has a 'Slide to verify' component that prevents form submission. This blocks all frontend testing and user access. Either simplify the verification or fix the slider component to allow proper authentication. All backend APIs are working perfectly (BUY/SELL, short expiries, all asset categories).
